gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: We've swept out the old Polar integration code to keep our billing systems lean and mean. Stripe is still handling things smoothly!
gist.summary: Removed the deprecated Polar integration, including webhooks, SDK dependencies, and test mocks, to streamline the billing architecture.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup reduces codebase bloat and simplifies our payment infrastructure, with no changes to the user experience.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny janitor hat, sweeping away icy blue floppy disks (representing Polar) from a cozy server room, leaving it clean and organized.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping away icy blue floppy disks from a warm, glowing server room. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
